a100-40g__fp16__heavy.reason: Needs 8 a100-40g GPUs for VRAM and peak traffic; Standard_NC96ads_A100_v4 exposes 4.

a100-40g__int8__heavy.reason: Needs 5 a100-40g GPUs for VRAM and peak traffic; Standard_NC96ads_A100_v4 exposes 4.

t4__fp16__medium.reason: Needs 4 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

t4__fp16__heavy.reason: Needs 37 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

t4__int8__medium.reason: Needs 3 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

t4__int8__heavy.reason: Needs 22 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

t4__int4__medium.reason: Needs 2 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

t4__int4__heavy.reason: Needs 15 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

compositions.*.inputs.self_host_throughp.label: calculated
compositions.*.inputs.self_host_throughp.source: memory bandwidth divided by active parameter bytes, adjusted for quantization

compositions.*.self_host_monthly_usd.label: calculated
